commentary_text: The model favors Australia at 54% while the market favors Egypt at 39%, a 21-percentage-point gap on the Egypt win outcome. This inversion could reflect real-time information unavailable to the model—recent form swings, lineup changes, or injury developments—that have shifted expectations toward Egypt. Alternatively, the market may be pricing in factors the statistical framework does not capture, or the divergence could represent genuine uncertainty between two plausible readings of the matchup. The dashboard flags this as a significant signal worth monitoring rather than a judgment on which source is better calibrated.
